emails.subject: willis phillips
emails.body: willis phillips We would like to hire Willis Phillips from Koch. Rogers, Dana, I have all interviewed him and think he is a can't miss candidate. The bad news is that he was referred by a headhunter (the fee is 20% of first year package). This guy is quality and I want to make an offer. Please let me know if I can proceed ASAP.

emails.subject: FW: willis phillips
emails.body: FW: willis phillips Along with all the questions that Louise asked, can I please see the resume.

emails.subject: Re: FW: willis phillips
emails.body: Re: FW: willis phillips I gave you his resume 3 months ago. I am sending another copy upstairs today. He would be a manager level hire. No, he is not the ex-metals trader. I would like to hire this guy ASAP.
